title: Matki Usal with Jowar Bhakri
description: A Maharashtrian moth-bean curry with hearty jowar bhakri for a naturally gluten-free main meal.
explanation: Matki usal brings a different pulse and texture to the catalog, while jowar bhakri adds a robust millet grain option for wheat-free meals.
ingredients: 1 tsp Goda Masala or Garam Masala
instructions: Pressure-cook soaked matki until tender but holding shape.
Heat oil; cook onion, ginger-garlic, and tomato until the masala is soft.
Add turmeric, goda masala, salt, and cooked matki with enough water for a thick curry. Simmer 10 minutes.
Knead jowar flour with hot water and salt, pat into small bhakris, and cook on a hot tawa until cooked through.
Finish usal with lemon and coriander; serve with bhakri.
